title: Of Human Hearts
writer: Bradbury Foote, Honore Morrow, Conrad Richter
actors: Walter Huston, James Stewart, Gene Reynolds
plot: Ethan Wilkins is a poor and honest man who ministers to the human soul, while his son Jason yearns to be a doctor, helping people in the earthly realm.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
